## HITS Cascade Cluster [(used for hands-on exercises)]{style="font-size: 0.5em;"}

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
![](images/hits-cluster.jpg)
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
The cluster provides over **3,000 CPU cores**, which can be used for general-purpose parallel workloads and CPU-bound applications.

**300 NVIDIA RTX 2080 Super GPUs** makes it well-suited for molecular dynamics simulations, machine learning workflows, and large-scale linear algebra computations.
:::
:::
